divergences.claim: IdempotencyStore.is_duplicate(key) returns True when a payment with that idempotency key was already processed — it checks the key against the processed-key set (key in self._processed). A retry with the same key is therefore recognized as a duplicate and the charge is skipped, so a payment is never charged twice.
divergences.prose: IdempotencyStore.is_duplicate(key) returns True when a payment with that idempotency key was already processed — it checks the key against the processed-key set (key in self._processed). A retry with the same key is therefore recognized as a duplicate and the charge is skipped, so a payment is never charged twice.
